headline: Endpoint Module no 1
description: Search and analayze all collected artifacts
readMoreText: Elasticsearch is used for storing, searching, and analyzing structured and unstructured data in near real-time. One of the key features of Elasticsearch is its scalability, which allows it to handle large datasets across multiple nodes in a cluster.
